summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ReversePicks iteration 4 focusing on Whop authentication system and premium UI polish. All core authentication flows working perfectly: owner auto-login, lifetime subscriber password setup, and non-subscriber rejection. Premium UI elements including glass-morphism header, glow effects, and animated login page confirmed working. Backend APIs maintain 100% success rate with new Whop auth endpoints.

minor_issues.issue: AI prediction occasionally returns 0% confidence and fallback values for some players
minor_issues.impact: Prediction display may show low confidence for players with limited data
minor_issues.note: Same issue as previous iterations - feature works correctly with players who have sufficient historical data

passed_tests: Backend /api/health endpoint - 100% success
Backend /api/leagues returns 30 leagues correctly
Backend /api/leagues/39/teams returns 20 Premier League teams
Backend player search functionality working
Backend Football API status shows online with valid subscription
NEW: Backend /api/auth/verify-whop with owner email (josselj001@gmail.com) returns verified=true with session token

NEW: Backend /api/auth/verify-whop with random email returns verified=false with proper error message
Chat session creation and Gemini AI messaging working
Natural query parsing functionality working
AI prediction endpoint responding with structured data
NEW: Login page loads with RP logo, glow background effect, and email input
NEW: Owner email auto-verifies and enters app without password requirement
NEW: Lifetime subscriber email correctly shows password setup form with 'Lifetime Access Confirmed' badge

NEW: Main app shows premium glass-morphism header with backdrop blur effects

NEW: Breadcrumb shows correct step progression (done/active states)
NEW: Logout button in header works and returns to login page
NEW: Chat tab loads 'Tactical Uplink' with Gemini welcome message
All required data-testid attributes present for robust testing
